module: ABS/ASC Mk4 — Anti-lock braking / stability control
note: Keyed on exact German ORTTEXT (fault-location) string returned by the SGBD; variant-agnostic.

faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VL, Triggersignal: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front left, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VR, Triggersignal: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front right, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HL, Triggersignal: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear left, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HR, Triggersignal: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear right, trigger signal
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VL, Kontinuitaet: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front left, continuity
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VR, Kontinuitaet: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front right, continuity
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HL, Kontinuitaet: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear left, continuity
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HR, Kontinuitaet: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear right, continuity
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VL, Anfahrerkennu: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front left, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler VR, Anfahrerkennu: Wheel-speed sensor fault, front right, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HL, Anfahrerkennu: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear left, pull-away detection
faults.Drehzahlfuehler Fehler HR, Anfahrerkennu: Wheel-speed sensor fault, rear right, pull-away detection
